refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target throughout the operational period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (link availability) and ties it explicitly to the customer-defined target and operational timeframe, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor network link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability status to relevant stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network communication paths with automatic failover.
DP2: Use real-time link health monitoring and predictive failure detection algorithms.
DP3: Provide link status reporting and alerting mechanisms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network communication paths with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover logic
Reporting interfaces coupled with monitoring data
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the FR with manageable coupling; monitoring and reporting can be modularized to reduce diffusion.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability.
Risk that failover timing may not meet availability targets.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing monitoring and reporting DPs separately in next refinement to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical network communication hardware and embedded failover logic within the vehicle system.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Primary communication channel subject to redundancy and failover.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends link status and health data to NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as failover logic and hardware reside here; low diffusion risk.
Contains system-level monitoring and reporting but less direct control over failover.
Receives telemetry but does not implement failover; moderate diffusion risk if logic duplicated.
Minimal containment; primarily consumers of safety alerts, not link management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing failover and redundancy logic within the Vehicle module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential for tight coupling with vehicle hardware limiting flexibility.
Risk of insufficient interface clarity with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts for telemetry and network link status to reduce coupling and diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant network paths with failover) directly addresses the refined FR and supports measurable availability targets.

diffusion_risks: Potential duplication of monitoring logic across Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
Interface complexity between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Failover logic is well contained in Vehicle; monitoring/reporting interfaces need clear definition to avoid diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring link availability and failover response times within the Vehicle module and validating telemetry data at system level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Ownership of failover logic is clear in Vehicle; telemetry interfaces clearly assigned to NGHE Solution and Teleoperation.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution for telemetry data.
Consider separating monitoring and reporting DPs in next level to reduce coupling.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition is sound, interface definitions and modularization of monitoring/reporting DPs require refinement to reduce coupling and diffusion risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor network link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability status to relevant stakeholders.

revise.why: To separate monitoring and reporting functions from failover logic, improving modularity and reducing coupling.

assumptions: Vehicle module can implement failover logic effectively.
open_risks: Interface complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Performance data on failover timing and link availability.
